query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS report_purchases (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id int NULL,
  email varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  quote_id int NOT NULL,
  payment_id int NULL,
  price_in_cents int NOT NULL,
  currency varchar(3) DEFAULT 'AUD' NOT NULL,
  access_token varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  access_expires_at timestamp NULL,
  report_delivered_at timestamp NULL,
  download_count int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX report_purchases_email_idx (email),
  INDEX report_purchases_quote_id_idx (quote_id),
  INDEX report_purchases_access_token_idx (access_token)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS report_purchases (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id int NULL,
  email varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  quote_id int NOT NULL,
  payment_id int NULL,
  price_in_cents int NOT NULL,
  currency varchar(3) DEFAULT 'AUD' NOT NULL,
  access_token varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  access_expires_at timestamp NULL,
  report_delivered_at timestamp NULL,
  download_count int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX report_purchases_email_idx (email),
  INDEX report_purchases_quote_id_idx (quote_id),
  INDEX report_purchases_access_token_idx (access_token)
)
